name: Bergafjärden
description: =Allmänt= Sundsvalls största boulderområde. =Vägbeskrivning= Åk E4:an från Sundsvall söderut mot Njurundabommen. Tag vänster vid kyrkoruinen/Ica bommen (ca: 18 min från Sundsvall). Kör sedan rakt fram ca 500m, och därefter tag vänster vid skylt Björkön/Bergafjärden. Följ vägen rakt fram så kommer du att passera en viadukt och en bro. Tag därefter vänster och följ vägen rakt fram ca 200m. Följ sedan skyltningen mot Lörudden/Björkön och följ vägen 3km, sväng av mot Bergafjärden och följ asfaltvägen ~1 km. Sväng övre höger i 5vägskorsningen (egentligen följ asfaltsvägen). Ta första vänster (vid blå brevlåda). Vid vägs slut ta vänster in på liten skogsväg. Parkera i någon av fickorna efter 50-100m. Den första stigen du såg till höger (innan du parkerade) är den du ska följa i ca 500 m innan du får syn på den första stenen. Du kommer bl.a. gå över en äng med en röd stuga på. När du ser den första stenen rakt fram i kraftledningshygget har du berget till vänster.

sections.title: Access
sections.body:
=Sektorer=

Det finns en PDF-förare gjord av Fredrik Bodin här: http://sundsvallsklatterklubb.se/index.php?page=forare

sections.title: En annan sten
sections.body: Ut på åkern och sen första stigen till höger. Det här är första stenen du kommer till efter cirka 100 meter.

sections.title: Andra stenen
sections.body: Den andra stenen man stöter på när man kommer svängt av från åkern och passerat första stenen.

sections.title: Pyramidblocket
sections.body: Ligger ned till höger från stigen sett när man har "En annan sten" upp åt vänster. Mycket trevlig sten med lite lättare problem upp till 6A, bra landningar

routes.name: Höstrusk

routes.name: Shuriken

routes.name: Coca Cola

routes.name: Abusio
routes.description: Sittstart vid arêten, följer denna upp.

routes.name: Veni

routes.name: Vidi

routes.name: Vici

routes.name: Lunae Dies

routes.name: Pillar of autumn

routes.name: Getingen

routes.name: Varsegod

routes.name: Dalle d'Jon

routes.name: Zig Zag

routes.name: Karmasutra

routes.name: Brownie

routes.name: Bulldozer

routes.name: Biscuit
routes.description: Går rakt upp längst till höger av blocket. Stenen till höger är ej med.

routes.name: Jordfelsbryt
routes.description: Går rakt upp.

routes.name: Morris Minor
routes.description: Sittstart längst till höger, följer kanten till vänster och upp vid areten. Stenen till höger är ej med. Dubbelvikt padda OK om man ej når i starten.

routes.name: Rough Daddy
routes.description: Sittstart, går upp med lätt dragning åt vänster. Stenen under är ej med.

routes.name: Skogslampan
routes.description: Rakt upp, areten är med.

routes.name: Sensetive Story
routes.description: Startar vid arêten från stenen under, går sedan rakt upp.

routes.name: Lekande Lätt
routes.description: Går rakt upp via hyllorna.

routes.name: Morguelized
routes.description: Börjar med dubbeldyno från nedre hyllan på stenen under upp till de två sloprarna på kanten. Går sedan rakt upp.

routes.name: Stubborn
routes.description: Börjar ståendes på stenen under taket, med händerna på undercling. Gå sedan rakt ut och upp.

routes.name: Up and Go
routes.description: Startar längst till vänster på ett block snett bakom Moonshadow. Följ kanten och avsluta sen rakt upp med en mantling.

routes.name: Moonshadow
routes.description: Startar med händerna på den vänstra av sloprarna, går rakt upp. Når man inte start greppet så går det bra med dubbelvikt padda.

routes.name: Tur Jonka
routes.description: Sittstart, rakt upp. Areten är med.

routes.name: Gegg i skägget
routes.description: Sittstart, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Crackers
routes.description: Följ den uppenbara sprickan hela vägen.

routes.name: Amaranth
routes.description: Går rakt upp 1.5 meter till höger om Crackers. Schysst halvdynamiskt avslut.

routes.name: Horseforce
routes.description: Startar vid areten, går rakt upp. Ej hoppstart.

routes.name: Reload
routes.description: Startar med två små krimpar, går sedan rakt upp. Dubbelvikt matta är tillåtet om man inte når till startgreppen.

routes.name: Overload
routes.description: Sittstart vid den utstickande spetsen längst in till höger. Gå snett upp åt vänster och länka med "Reload".

routes.name: Backsplash

routes.name: Gangbang Squad
routes.description: Börjar på stenen längst in, går sedan ut över klämblocket och upp. Väggarna på sidorna är ej med.

routes.name: Lil' slab
routes.description: Rakt upp.

routes.name: Dynomatics
routes.description: Dyno från den stora hyllan till toppen.

routes.name: Lost in thought
routes.description: Rakt upp, stora hyllan till vänster är med.

routes.name: Vicke Vire
routes.description: Sittstart med vänster han på låg crimp och höger hand på list, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Tummelisa
routes.description: Sittstart med båda händerna på den stora listen, går sedan rakt upp.

routes.name: Fuck You

routes.name: Kapten Krimp
routes.description: Börjar där marken är som lägst, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Debris

routes.name: Hålslag

routes.description: Startar med händerna i sprickan, går rakt upp utan att använda vänstra arêten.

routes.name: Pjux
routes.description: Sittstart på blocket bredvid. Båda händerna på listen. Gå upp till spetsen på stenen.

routes.name: Brännmy
routes.description: Börja på hyllan och gå rakt upp över ryggen på stenen till toppen.

routes.name: Arbetshandskar
routes.description: Kammen till höger om 'kriterium'. Lättare och lättare ju högre man kommer.

routes.name: Kriterium
routes.description: Går på ett vänsterlutande arete som ligger längs stigen mellan Overload och Dwarf Hunter.Bryt över när du kommer upp till den lilla hyllan.

routes.name: Wrecking Ball
routes.description: Går till vänster om "Stumble into Grace" på samma vägg som denna, starta just till vänster om tallen och gå rakt upp på skölden.

routes.name: Profile
routes.description: Längst till höger på väggen till vänster om 'wrecking ball'. Extrem lätt klättring de sista 3 meter.

routes.name: Stumble Into Grace
routes.description: Den klockrena sprickan på väggen ovanför "Reload". Startar uppe på den lutande blocket och är med sitt höga krux ett skönt pirrande problem.

routes.name: Stumble on the edge
routes.description: Travers som börjar vid stumble in to grace!Äntligen en längre travers i Berga!!!!

routes.name: Elite Hotel
routes.description: Följer ett elegant arete just till vänster om en grov spricka 20 meter till vänster om Stumble into Grace. Efter sex meter så lättar klättringen upp betydligt.

routes.name: Klämkäck
routes.description: Sittstart under "stalagtiten". Går rakt upp utan väggen till vänster. Avslutas med en matchning till höger på övre överhänget.

routes.name: Meatbeard
routes.description: Går brevid Klämkäck. Klättra kaminen bakom stalktiten. Fastna inte!

routes.name: I maskopi (med en sursloper)
routes.description: Sittstart, rakt upp.

routes.name: Power pack
routes.description: Ligger på hörnet innan I maskopi med en surslop. Startar med vänster på ett krimp och höger på areten. Klättra sen rakt upp mha krimp och aretet.

routes.name: Nougat
routes.description: Går rakt upp.

routes.name: Medan barnet sover
routes.description: Ståstart till vänster om Nogat, följ kanten rakt upp.

routes.name: Monkeyboy
routes.description: Startar frihängande med händerna på den nedre hyllan, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Crafty
routes.description: Startar under det stora sidepullen, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Synaps
routes.description: Går rakt upp. Ramla inte ned åt vänster!

routes.name: Collateral
routes.description: Startar till vänster om Zegul. Starta med vänsterhand på aréten och höger på en crimp. Klättra till höger om aréten och avsluta problemet med mantling.

routes.name: Zegul
routes.description: Startar till höger och runt hörnet om Nu äre brottomt. Klättra rakt upp och avsluta med en mantling.

routes.name: Nu äre brottomt
routes.description: Startar i sprickan ca 3 m till höger om Sans Balance. Följa sprickan rakt upp.

routes.name: Quick step
routes.description: Startar mellan Trance balance och Nu äre brottomt. Klättra rakt upp.

routes.name: Trance balance
routes.description: Sittstart på Sans Balance.

routes.name: Sans Balance
routes.description: Startar med ganska låg crimp för höger hand och arêten för vänster hand, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Kristalldans
routes.description: Startar mitt på väggen runt hörnet till vänster om Trans Balance. Klättra rakt upp.

routes.name: Locktight
routes.description: Börjar med händerna på den stora hyllan, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Kneelock
routes.description: Börjar med händerna på den stora hyllan, går rakt upp. Stenen till vänster är ej med.

routes.name: Sweden
routes.description: Starta med det ni når, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Crackileria
routes.description: Ligger till höger om Frostrearande. Följ sprickan upp.

routes.name: Frostrerande
routes.description: Rakt upp. Håll dig till vänster om den kraftiga sprickan.

routes.name: Première
routes.description: Sittstart med händerna på den lilla arêten, går rakt upp och avslutas som "Air Pocket".

routes.name: Air Pocket
routes.description: Börjar med hoppstart under det lilla taket, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Conquer
routes.description: Följer den kraftiga sprickan upp åt höger. Ej hoppstart.

routes.name: Vanquish
routes.description: Börjar vid den bra sidepullen, går rakt upp. Stora sprickan till höger är ej med.

routes.name: Hellvis
routes.description: Går rakt upp mellan "Hell Hopp" och "Vanquish". OK med hoppstart om man ej når till greppet för högerhanden. Håll linjen.

routes.name: Hell Hopp
routes.description: Startar med händerna på den stora listen, sedan är det bara att skicka på upp till crimpen och gå vidare.

routes.name: Dwarf Birch Hunter
routes.description: Startar till vänster om den lilla björken med båda händerna på den stora jugen. Går rakt upp.

routes.name: Razor´s Edge
routes.description: Börja på sneda listen, etablera starten. Följ sprickan åt vänster och mantla vid spetsen.

routes.name: The Grater
routes.description: Sittstart, går rakt upp. Ligger mellan "Dwarf Hunter" och "Razor´s Edge"

routes.name: Dwarf Hunter
routes.description: Sittstart med båda händerna inne på rampen. Rakt upp.

routes.name: Fight Club
routes.description: Sittstart vid arêten, traversera åt höger och avluta som Dwarf Hunter.

routes.name: Pussklubben
routes.description: Starta som "Fight Club" men gå rakt upp istället.

routes.name: No time to dance
routes.description: Vänster hand på litet crimp och höger pinchar hörnet på stenen. Går rakt upp. Dubbelvikt padda är tillåtet om man ej når till startgreppen.

routes.name: Warts
routes.description: Starta med höger hand på stort grepp och vänster på sidepull. går rakt upp. Den stora hyllan på vänstersidan är inte med.

routes.name: Smack my bitch up
routes.description: Börja hängande längst till höger på hyllan. Gå sedan upp på upp på avsatsen och vidare upp till kanten högst upp och mantla. Stenarna under är inte med!

routes.name: Reach the top
routes.description: Ståstart. Börja i sprickan och gå rakt upp.

routes.name: JAS - Grip den!
routes.description: Startar med händerna på greppet som är där den vertikala sprickan möter den lodräta. Dyno till kanten.

routes.name: Klumpfot
routes.description: Startar med händerna på hyllan längst till vänster. Följer den vertikala sprickan fram till lodräta sprickan där man går rakt upp endast med hjälp utav sprickan och hålet.

routes.name: Balett
routes.description: Rakt upp, tillåtet att kliva upp på stenen till höger.

routes.name: Kneetroglycerin
routes.description: Sittstart, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Darkness falls
routes.description: Sittstart, med dragning åt höger runt hörnet.

routes.name: Dante
routes.description: Sittstart, rakt upp.

routes.name: Nattsvårt
routes.description: Rakt upp, börjar ståstart där man står som längst ner.

routes.name: Di Centi
routes.description: Sittstart på lilla stenen, rakt upp, utan areterna. Man får använda stenarna under stenen.

routes.name: Cactus Line
routes.description: Sittstart följ areten åt vänster, stenarna under stenen får man använda.

routes.name: Guanabana Pineapple
routes.description: Följ areten åt höger och mantla där det är som högst.

routes.name: Mud Shovel
routes.description: Sittstart, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Fett med nöff
routes.description: Sittstart på höger sida av areten, fin och ganska hög (lätt på slutet).

routes.name: Fläskläpp
routes.description: Börjar med två crimprar, går rakt upp utan att använda hyllan ute på arêten.

routes.name: Fett med grymt
routes.description: Börjar en meter vänster om "Chat with the Bat", går rakt upp.

routes.name: Chat whit the Bat
routes.description: Startar vid det stora steget, går rakt upp med lätt dragning åt höger.

routes.name: Statisk Elektricitet
routes.description: Startar med den tydliga listen, gå sedan statiskt rakt upp.

routes.name: Dynamisk Puls
routes.description: Startar med händerna på den stora listen, kliv upp och dyna till kanten.

routes.name: Funky feet
routes.description: Rakt upp.

routes.name: Företagspaket
routes.description: Rakt upp, hela vägen.

routes.name: Express
routes.description: Följer rampen upp.

routes.name: Jetpack
routes.description: Börjar med händerna på den bra listen, dyna upp till kanten. Rampen till höger är ej med.

routes.name: REK
routes.description: Börjar med händerna på den låga hyllan, går sedan upp med dragning åt vänster.

routes.name: Surläpp
routes.description: Startar med frihäng ute på läppen, gå sedan rakt upp. Inga andra stenar är med.

routes.name: Play
routes.description: Börjar med händerna på listerna i sprickan, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Operate
routes.description: Börjar med händerna på det stora greppet, går rakt upp utan att gå höger på slutet.

routes.name: Rewind
routes.description: Börjar med den bra listen i sprickan, går rakt upp. Följ kammen på slutet.

routes.name: Eject
routes.description: Börjar med crimp. Går rakt upp.

routes.name: Bolibompa
routes.description: Går rakt upp.

routes.name: Sweetcorn Arete
routes.description: Rakt upp. Fin.

routes.name: To the other side
routes.description: Rakt upp.

routes.name: Break on through
routes.description: Rakt upp.

routes.name: Tvångsmässigt betéende
routes.description: Sittstart med händerna på rampen. (Inneslutning)Pocketen måste användas för att man skall ha tagit den.

routes.name: Space Odyssey
routes.description: Går rakt upp till vänster om granen

routes.name: Höger
routes.description: Går rakt upp. Ledvarning.

routes.name: Fantasia
routes.description: Går rakt upp.

routes.name: Centi
routes.description: Sittstart vid arêten, följer denna upp.

routes.name: Child labour
routes.description: Startar på areten till höger om Hang Loose. Traversera efter kanten och avsluta med samma utsteg som Hang Loose.

routes.name: Hang Loose
routes.description: Sittstart, går rakt upp.

routes.name: le Petit assis
routes.description: Sittstart, rakt upp.

routes.name: Twisted
routes.description: Sittstart, går rakt upp.

routes.name: The upsetter
routes.description: Mycket lågt problem. Sittstart och rakt upp.

routes.name: Anfall
routes.description: Startar lika som "Snöfall" men går rakt upp istället.

routes.name: Snöfall
routes.description: Börjar med sittstart nere till höger, gå vänster upp till hyllan och sedan rakt upp över bullen.

routes.name: Avfall
routes.description: Startar med händerna på den lägsta hyllan direkt till vänster om granen, går rakt upp. Osopade hyllan till vänster är utesluten.

routes.name: Red alert
routes.description: Sittstart, rakt upp.

routes.name: Höjdarna
routes.description: Startar lika som "Defcon 1", går ut till areten och sedan upp.

routes.name: Defcon 1
routes.description: Sittstart, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Alarm
routes.description: Går rakt upp. Stå ej på stenarna nedanför i starten.

routes.name: Velociraptor
routes.description: Sittstart, går rakt upp

routes.name: Dinosaurus-Rex
routes.description: Går rakt upp.

routes.name: Stegosaurus
routes.description: Sittstart, börjar med vänster häl på hyllan längst in till vänster. Går sedan rakt ut över spettsen, utan att gå ut åt någon av sidorna.

routes.name: Hook
routes.description: Sittstart, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Jolly Roger
routes.description: Sittstart vid bullen, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Dukater
routes.description: Går rakt upp.

routes.name: Dubloner
routes.description: Går rakt upp.

routes.name: Träben
routes.description: Går rakt upp.

routes.name: X
routes.description: Sittstart med vänster hand på kanten och höger på krimp i överhänget, följer kanten ut åt höger. Mantla ute på "bullen".

routes.name: Steglös
routes.description: Går rakt upp.

routes.name: Fransk Brytning
routes.description: Sittstart vid hörnet av stenen, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Cloudburst
routes.description: Går rakt upp.

routes.name: Rainman
routes.description: Går rakt upp.

routes.name: Purl
routes.description: Sittstart, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Short Circuit
routes.description: Går rakt upp utan att gå för långt åt vänster.

routes.name: Stiff Legged
routes.description: Börja med höger hand på sidepull, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Rip Off
routes.description: Går rakt upp vid areten. Stenen under är ej med.

routes.name: Slip Off
routes.description: Startar till vänster om "Rip Off" mellan blocken och utan att stå på stenen på backen i starten. Går rakt upp. Svårare om man är lite kortare.

routes.name: Halvdan
routes.description: Går rakt upp.

routes.name: Gömd
routes.description: Går upp på den högra sidan av areten.

routes.name: Lättma
routes.description: Går rakt upp.

routes.name: Krångel
routes.description: Sittstart med händerna på slopen, går rakt upp.

routes.name: Pappa timmen
routes.description: Klättra rakt upp.

routes.name: Hörnet
routes.description: Klättra rakt upp vid pilen. Problemet ligger ca 5 m till v om Höjdarna

routes.name: Döp een Jegas?
routes.description: Klättra rakt upp.

routes.name: Hyllhängaren
routes.description: Samma start som Hörnet. Följ sen hylla ut åt v ca 1,5 m. Avsluta sen rakt upp.

routes.name: Såja
routes.description: Startar ca 1,5 m till h om Red Alert. Klättra sen rakt upp.

routes.name: Vit vaksamhet
routes.description: Ståstart, klättra på enklaste sätt rakt vid pilen ca 2,5 m till v om Red Alert.

routes.name: Drömlinjen
routes.description: Klättra rakt upp vid pilen, ligger ca 1,5 m till v om Velociraptor.

routes.name: Singel i busken
routes.description: Klättra rakt upp och följ sen kanten ut åt v ca 2m, avsluta sen rakt upp. Problemet ligger på en sten ca 50 m till v om stigen upp till väggen med Premier.

routes.name: Stenar i mossen
routes.description: Följ kanten upp åt höger. Avsluta rakt upp där stenen är som högst. Ligger ca 4 m till v om Singel i busken.

routes.name: Ensamdvärg
routes.description: Sittstart där Razors edge startar. Går rakt upp.

access.legacyText:
=Sektorer=

Det finns en PDF-förare gjord av Fredrik Bodin här: http://sundsvallsklatterklubb.se/index.php?page=forare

description.text: =General= Sundsvall’s largest bouldering area. =Directions= Take the E4 south from Sundsvall towards Njurundabommen. Turn left by the church ruins/ICA Bommen (approx. 18 min from Sundsvall). Continue straight ahead for about 500 m, then turn left at the sign for Björkön/Bergafjärden. Follow the road straight ahead, passing beneath a viaduct and over a bridge. Then turn left and continue straight ahead for about 200 m. Follow the signs for Lörudden/Björkön and continue for 3 km, then turn towards Bergafjärden and follow the tarmac road for ~1 km. Take the upper-right road at the five-way junction (in practice, just follow the tarmac road). Take the first left, by a blue postbox. At the end of the road, turn left onto a small forest track. Park in one of the pull-ins after 50–100 m. Follow the first path you passed on the right before parking for about 500 m until the first boulder comes into view. Along the way, you will cross a meadow with a red cottage. When you see the first boulder straight ahead in the power-line clearing, the crag is on your left.

body.text:
=Sectors=

A PDF guide by Fredrik Bodin is available here: http://sundsvallsklatterklubb.se/index.php?page=forare
Head out onto the field, then take the first path on the right. This is the first boulder you reach, after about 100 metres.
The second boulder you come to after leaving the field and passing the first boulder.
Down to the right of the path when you have "En annan sten" up to the left. A very pleasant boulder with some easier problems up to 6A and good landings.

description.text: Starts high on the boulder and goes straight up via the hole.
Starts where the large block has broken away and goes straight up.
Start established with hands on the large undercling; straight up.
Straight up without standing on the boulder below. No jump start.
Start established with both hands on the low sloper; straight up.
Starts where the ground is lowest, left of the arete, and goes straight up. Morpho.
Starts with hands on the small arete and goes straight up. No jump start.
Start established with hands on the low sloper; straight up.
Starts with hands on the sloper and goes straight up. Two pads may be stacked if you cannot reach the starting hold.
Sit start with left hand on the low, good edge and right hand on the sloper; straight up. Two pads may be stacked if you cannot reach the sloper.
Sit start at the overhang, where the boulder is lowest. Straight up to the ledge, then up right.
Sit start directly below the arete; straight up.
Sit start at the arete; straight up.
Sit start; straight up.
Sit start at the arete; straight up.
Sit start with hands on the lowest ledge; straight up.
Sit start with hands on the large sloper; straight up.
Sit start with hands on the ledge left of Gnatish; straight up.
Sit start with hands on the sloper; straight up without using the boulder's back edge. Guaranteed to be Berga's lowest problem.
Sit start on the arete furthest back beneath the roof. Follow it out and mantle at the end.
Sit start with hands on small edges furthest back beneath the roof. Climb up and out over the roof, finishing with a mantle.
Sit start with hands on the lip at the outer edge of the roof, then straight up.
Jump start from footholds low on the wall to the sloper at the outer edge of the roof, then straight up.
Sit start at the arete; straight up.
Sit start beneath the overhang; straight up.
Straight up.
Starts directly below the small corner and goes straight up.
Straight up immediately right of the arete. Do not stand on the boulder to the right.
Sit start at the arete; straight up.
Sit-start extension to Överste Barsk; straight up.
Straight up.
Straight up.
Straight up.
Straight up.
Starts beneath the arete and goes straight up without using the huge jug on either side.
Starts beneath the arete and takes the easiest line up, via the huge jug on the left.
Straight up.
Straight up, with the arete out. Do not stand on the boulder below at the start.
Straight up, without using the arete.
Sit start at the very tip and go straight up. The large boulder below is in.
Straight up from a sit start left of the tree.
Sit start right of the tree; straight up.
Straight up, starting with left hand on a small sloper and right hand on a crimp.
Sit start left of the arete. Straight up without using the arete.
Starts with hands on the edge by the leftmost arete, then follows the arete all the way up.
Straight up at the small corner; the aretes are out.
Follow the arete up.
Straight up without using the arete.
Follow the arete to the top.
Sit start at the arete and follow it to the top.
Sit start with both hands on the obvious rail. Move right, then straight up.
Start on the obvious rail, then climb straight up.
Sit start on the obvious rail, then climb up trending left.
Sit start at the arete and follow it to the top.
Sit start at the arete and follow it to the top.
Sit start with both hands on the obvious hold and climb straight up.
Standing start at the arete and climb straight up. No jump start.
Sit start with both hands on the rail and climb straight up.
Dyno from the large rail on "Bergakungen" to the lip diagonally up and right.
Sit start at the arete with both hands on poor holds, then climb straight up.
Start with both hands on the ramp (crack), make a dynamic move to the lip and mantle over it (a tricky mantle for me).
Start with both hands on the ramp (crack), where it begins to rise left, then reach the lip and mantle over.

Start with a foot on the lowest ledge left of Glada gubben. Continue with hands in the crack, moving left along the ledges before heading right at the end. Top out right of the top bulge. Junior highball.
Left hand on a ledge-like rail in the crack and right hand on a pinch jug beneath the roof. Straight up and over the lip.
Both hands in the crack. Straight up and over the lip.
Left hand on a sloper in the crack and right hand around the arete on a sloping bulge. Straight up and over the lip.
Start with both hands in the crack (hole) and climb straight up.
Sit start at the arete. Climb straight up without using the large pocket.
Sit start, then climb up trending slightly right.
Same start as Tvillingarna Kramp, but climb straight up.
Sit start at the arrow on the arete, about 4 m left of Red Alert. Climb straight up.
Sit start at the bulge and follow the edge straight up.
Sit start at the arete and climb straight up.
Climb straight up right of the tree. Start where the ground is lowest.
Start on the arete right of Blockchoklad as viewed from the path. Climb straight up and finish using the slab.
Sit start and climb straight up.
Straight up.
Sit start with both hands on the obvious rail and climb straight up.
Sit start at the overhang with both hands on small crimps and climb straight up.
Sit start at the arete, follow it, then finish up the slab.
Climb straight up right of the pine, without using the flake with the jug out right.
Sit start in the middle of the small overhang and climb straight up.
Sit start left of the tree and climb straight up.
Climb straight up. The stone below may only be used if you cannot reach the lower pair of rails.
Start at the lip and climb straight up. The stones on either side are out.
Sit start with both hands on the ledge and climb straight up.
Straight up.
Straight up.
Sit start with one hand on the obvious jug and climb straight up without using the arete.
Straight up.
Start at the small arete, then climb up trending slightly right.
Sit start between the two large sidepulls and climb straight up.
Standing start on the large ledge, then straight up.
Sit start on the left side of the arete, then straight up.
Sit start, straight up.
Straight up, without the left arete.
Sit start with both hands on the large edge, then straight up.
Climbs up, trending slightly left.
Sit start with both hands on the large edge, then straight up.
Sit start, straight up.
Follows the shallow corner straight up.
Straight up, without using the arete on the right or the wall on the left.
Sit start with both hands on the obvious edge, then follow the right side of the arete to the top.
Starts with both hands on the good undercut, then goes straight up without straying to either side.
Sit start with both hands on two undercuts; link into "Bald is Beautiful".
Starts on the large hold and climbs straight up, trending slightly right along the natural line.
Starts on the arete. Straight up.
Sit start, straight up.
Straight up. The easiest way down from the boulder.
Sit start, straight up.
Starts at the arete, then follows the lip leftwards.
Starts at the arete, then straight up.
Straight up.
Straight up, without the left arete.
Straight up the arete, without using the rock on the right.
Straight up, without the arete.
Straight up.
Straight up.
Sit start with both hands on the ledge. Climb straight up to the lip, follow it rightwards, then mantle at its highest point.
Straight up.
Starts on the undercut, then follows the left side of the arete to the top.
Starts on the edges in the middle of the overhang, then goes straight up.
Starts at the far right of the boulder and goes straight up.
Starts to the right of the rock on the ground, then goes straight up.
Sit start low on the right of the boulder below, then straight up.
Sit start at the large edge, then straight up.
Sit start, following the crack rightwards.
Starts with the right hand under the lip and the left hand on an edge, then goes straight up.
Sit start, straight up.
Sit start at the arete, with the left hand on an edge and the right hand on a fairly low hold. Straight up.

Sit start at the back of the cave with both hands on the edges in the overhang, then climb straight up via the hole above. The rock to the side is out. A folded-over pad is allowed if you cannot reach the edges.
On the large boulder about 5m right of "Dr Pepper". Start with both hands on the lip and mantle up.
On the boulder next to "Coca cola". Start with one hand on each arete and climb straight up over the tip of the boulder.
On a protruding boulder almost beside the tree. Start with both hands under the lower lip and both feet on the rock to the left. Climb straight up to the left of the arete.
Sit start at the arete and follow it to the top.
Sit start at the obvious edge, then straight up.
Starts on the slightly larger holds, then straight up.
Starts on small edges close to the arete, then goes straight up. The arete is out.
Sit start left of the arete, with the left hand on a crimp and the right hand on the arete. Straight up.
Start with your right hand on an edge and your left on a crimp, then go straight up.
Start far in on the left-hand boulder with both hands on the jug. Move onto the overhang on the next boulder, then continue round and mantle in the middle of the face.
Sit start. Straight up, finishing slightly left.
Right-hand variation of Apocalypse. Start as for Apocalypse, but head right into Götterdämmerung. Nice moves!
Start with both hands on the low ledge and go straight up.
Sit start at the far right of the boulder and follow the edge to the top. The boulder on the right may be used for your feet at the start.
Straight up. More fun without the jug high on the right.
Start hanging from two slopers on the lip, then head up, trending slightly left.
Sit start on the small boulder, with your left hand on a small ledge on the arete and your right in a Gaston. Continue to the top of the boulder.
Start with the large sidepull for your left hand and a crimp for your right, then go straight up.
Sit start with both hands on the sloping ledge, then go straight up.
Sit start by the arete and go straight up.
Straight up at the far right of the boulder. The boulder on the right is out.
Straight up.
Sit start at the far right, follow the edge left and finish up the arete. The boulder on the right is out. A folded-over pad is allowed if you cannot reach the starting holds.
Sit start and head up, trending slightly left. The boulder underneath is out.
Straight up, using the arete.
Start at the arete from the boulder underneath, then go straight up.
Straight up via the ledges.
Start with a double-handed dyno from the lower ledge on the boulder underneath to the two slopers on the lip, then go straight up.
Start standing on the boulder beneath the roof, with both hands on the undercling. Continue straight out and up.
Start at the far left of a boulder diagonally behind Moonshadow. Follow the edge, then finish straight up with a mantle.
Start with both hands on the left-hand sloper and go straight up. A folded-over pad may be used if you cannot reach the starting hold.
Sit start and go straight up. The arete is in.
Sit start and go straight up.
Follow the obvious crack all the way up.
Straight up, 1.5 metres right of Crackers. Nice semi-dynamic finish.
Start by the arete and go straight up. No jump start.
Start on two small crimps, then go straight up. A folded-over pad is allowed if you cannot reach the starting holds.
Sit start at the protruding point far inside on the right. Head diagonally up left and link into Reload.
Start with both hands on the lip of the low boulder. Make a double-handed dyno to the brushed ‘ball’ on the boulder above.
Start on the innermost boulder, then move out over the wedged boulder and up. The walls on either side are out.
Straight up.
Dyno from the large ledge to the top.
Straight up. The large ledge on the left is in.
Sit start with your left hand on a low crimp and your right on an edge, then go straight up.
Sit start with both hands on the large edge, then go straight up.
Sit start with both hands on the large edge, then head diagonally up right.
Start where the ground is lowest and go straight up.
Straight up the left side of the arete.
Start with both hands on the ledge, sitting on the boulder behind, then head up, trending left.
Straight up without using your hands. 3A variation using hands.
Straight up where the roof is highest. Morpho.
Straight up where the roof becomes lower. Morpho.
Sit start, straight up.
Straight up.
Standing start where the ground is lowest. The left arete is in.
Starts below the large undercling, without standing on either of the rocks on the ground. Straight up.
Sit start by the arete, then straight up.
Starts with both hands directly above the large ramp in the overhang, then goes straight up.
Jump start from the rock beneath the overhang, then straight up without straying onto Rockshock.
Starts with both hands in the crack, then straight up without using the left arete.
Sit start on the adjacent block, with both hands on the edge. Climb to the tip of the boulder.
Start on the ledge and climb straight up over the spine of the boulder to the top.
The rib to the right of Kriterium. Gets easier and easier the higher you climb.
Climbs a left-leaning arete beside the path between Overload and Dwarf Hunter. Rock over when you reach the small ledge.
Left of Stumble Into Grace on the same wall. Start just left of the pine and climb straight up the shield.
At the far right of the wall left of Wrecking Ball. The final 3 metres are extremely easy.
The perfect crack on the wall above Reload. Starts on top of the sloping block and has an exhilarating high crux.
A right-to-left traverse starting at Stumble Into Grace. Finally, a longer traverse at Berga!
Follows an elegant arete just left of a wide crack, 20 metres left of Stumble Into Grace. After six metres, the climbing becomes considerably easier.
Sit start beneath the ‘stalactite’. Straight up without using the wall to the left. Finishes by matching on the right side of the upper overhang.
Beside Klämkäck. Climb the chimney behind the stalactite. Don’t get stuck!
Sit start, straight up.
On the corner before I maskopi (med en sursloper). Start with your left hand on a crimp and your right on the arete, then climb straight up using crimps and the arete.
Straight up.
Standing start left of Nougat; follow the edge straight up.
Hanging start with both hands on the lower ledge, then straight up.
Starts beneath the large sidepull, then straight up.
Straight up. Don’t fall off to the left!
Starts left of Zegul, with your left hand on the arete and your right on a crimp. Climb to the right of the arete and mantle to finish.
Starts to the right, round the corner from Nu äre brottomt. Climb straight up and mantle to finish.
Starts in the crack about 3 metres right of Sans Balance. Follow the crack straight up.
Starts between Trance balance and Nu äre brottomt. Climb straight up.
Sit-start version of Sans Balance.
Starts with a fairly low crimp for the right hand and the arete for the left, then goes straight up.
Starts in the middle of the wall, round the corner to the left of Trance balance. Climb straight up.
Starts with both hands on the large ledge, then straight up.
Starts with both hands on the large ledge, then straight up. The boulder to the left is out.
Start on whatever you can reach, then go straight up.
Right of Frostrerande. Follow the crack up.
Straight up, keeping left of the wide crack.
Sit start with both hands on the small arete, then straight up to finish as for Air Pocket.
Jump start beneath the small roof, then straight up.
Follows the wide crack up and right. No jump start.
Starts at the good sidepull, then straight up. The large crack to the right is out.
Straight up between Hell Hopp and Vanquish. A jump start is allowed if you cannot reach the right-hand hold. Keep to the line.
Start with both hands on the large edge, then launch for the crimp and continue up.
Start left of the small birch tree with both hands on the large jug. Straight up.
Start on the sloping edge and establish the start. Follow the crack left and mantle at the tip.
Sit start, straight up. Between "Dwarf Hunter" and "Razor´s Edge".
Sit start with both hands inside the ramp. Straight up.
Sit start by the arete, traverse right and finish as for Dwarf Hunter.
Start as for "Fight Club", but go straight up instead.
Left hand on a small crimp and right hand pinching the corner of the boulder. Straight up. A folded-over pad is allowed if you cannot reach the starting holds.
Start with your right hand on the large hold and left on the sidepull. Straight up. The large ledge on the left is out.
Start hanging from the far right of the ledge. Pull onto the ledge, continue to the top lip and mantle. The rocks underneath are out!
Standing start. Begin in the crack and go straight up.
Start with both hands on the hold where the vertical crack meets the other vertical crack. Dyno to the lip.
Start with both hands on the ledge at the far left. Follow the vertical crack to the other vertical crack, then go straight up using only the crack and the pocket.
Straight up. The rock on the right may be used to step up.
Sit start, straight up.
Sit start, trending right around the corner.
Sit start, straight up.
Straight up from a standing start at the lowest point where you can stand.
Sit start on the small rock and go straight up without using the aretes. The rocks beneath the boulder may be used.
Sit start and follow the arete left. The rocks beneath the boulder may be used.
Follow the arete right and mantle at its highest point.
Sit start, straight up.
Sit start on the right side of the arete. A good, fairly high problem, easier at the top.
Start on two crimps and go straight up without using the ledge out on the arete.
Start one metre left of "Chat with the Bat" and go straight up.
Start by the large step and go straight up, trending slightly right.
Start on the obvious edge, then climb statically straight up.
Start with both hands on the large edge, step up and dyno to the lip.
Straight up.
Straight up all the way.
Follow the ramp up.
Start with both hands on the good edge and dyno to the lip. The ramp on the right is out.
Start with both hands on the low ledge, then climb up trending left.
Start hanging freely from the outer lip, then go straight up. No other rocks may be used.
Start with both hands on the edges in the crack and go straight up.
Start with both hands on the large hold and go straight up without moving right at the top.
Start on the good edge in the crack and go straight up. Follow the ridge at the top.
Start on the crimp. Straight up.
Straight up.
Straight up. Good.
Straight up.
Straight up.
Sit start with both hands on the ramp. Elimination: the pocket must be used for the ascent to count.
Straight up to the left of the spruce tree.
Straight up. Joint warning.
Straight up.
Sit start at the arete and follow it up.
Starts on the arete right of Hang Loose. Traverse left along the edge and finish via the same top-out as Hang Loose.
Sit start, then straight up.
Sit start, straight up.
Sit start, then straight up.
A very low problem. Sit start, then straight up.
Same start as Snöfall, but continue straight up instead.
Sit start low on the right. Head up left to the ledge, then straight up over the bulge.
Start with both hands on the lowest ledge directly left of the spruce, then go straight up. The uncleaned ledge to the left is out.
Sit start, straight up.
Same start as Defcon 1. Head out to the arete, then up.
Sit start, then straight up.
Straight up. Do not stand on the rocks below at the start.
Sit start, then straight up.
Straight up.
Sit start with your left heel on the ledge furthest in on the left. Climb straight out over the tip without moving out to either side.
Sit start, then straight up.
Sit start at the bulge, then straight up.
Straight up.
Straight up.
Straight up.
Sit start with your left hand on the edge and right hand on a crimp in the overhang. Follow the edge rightwards and mantle onto the bulge.
Straight up.
Sit start at the corner of the boulder, then straight up.
Straight up.
Straight up.
Sit start, then straight up.
Straight up without straying too far left.
Start with your right hand on the sidepull, then go straight up.
Straight up by the arete. The block below is out.
Starts left of Rip Off, between the boulders, without standing on the rock on the ground at the start. Go straight up. Harder if you are shorter.
Straight up.
Climb the right side of the arete.
Straight up.
Sit start with both hands on the sloper, then straight up.
Climb straight up.
Climb straight up at the arrow. The problem is about 5 m west of Höjdarna.
Climb straight up.
Same start as Hörnet. Follow the ledge leftwards for about 1.5 m, then finish straight up.
Starts about 1.5 m right of Red Alert. Then climb straight up.
Standing start. Climb straight up at the arrow by the easiest line, about 2.5 m west of Red Alert.
Climb straight up at the arrow, about 1.5 m west of Velociraptor.
Climb straight up, then follow the edge leftwards for about 2 m and finish straight up. The problem is on a boulder about 50 m west of the path leading up to the wall with Premier.
Follow the edge up and right. Finish straight up where the boulder is highest. About 4 m west of Singel i busken.
Sit start where Razors edge starts, then go straight up.
